allow: Bash(sed -i -e 's|var runClient = |var runAgent = |' -e 's|if err := runClient\(ctx|if err := runAgent\(ctx|' /mnt/c/git/kompakt/cmd/kompakt-agent/main.go)

Bash(sed -i -e 's|// ── Client API ──|// ── Agent API ──|' -e 's|// POST /api/v1/register  — no auth; validated by registration secret|// POST /api/v1/register  — no auth; validated by registration secret|' -e 's|// dualAuth accepts requests authenticated with either a client JWT Bearer|// dualAuth accepts requests authenticated with either an agent JWT Bearer|' -e 's|// Artifacts are accessible by both clients \(JWT\) and root \(Basic auth\)\\.|// Artifacts are accessible by both agents \(JWT\) and root \(Basic auth\).|' /mnt/c/git/kompakt/internal/server/server.go)
